name: Broccoli Onion Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pie shell according to the package directions.
2. Beat the eggs and add all ingredients except for half of the onions.
3. Pour into the baked pie shell.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes to 1 hour until the top turns golden brown.
5. Serve with salad or a fruit cup. Great for summer.
